---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Computational biology · Multi-omics analysis · Pipeline development"
page-layout: article
toc: false
listing:
  - id: phase-cards
    contents: "projects/psychpgx/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "date asc"
    fields: [image, title, description]
    grid-columns: 3
---

## PsychPGx-MultiOmics

Pharmacogenomic stratification of psychiatric brain transcriptomics using fully open-access data. This project integrates SNP-derived CYP2D6/CYP2C19 activity scores with multi-region RNA-seq (SMRI Stanley Collections) and postmortem scATAC-seq (GEO GSE256207) through MOFA2, DIABLO, XGBoost + SHAP, and a VAE benchmark.

**Demonstrates:** End-to-end multi-omics pipeline execution using only open-access resources — from raw data to interpretable biological insights.

**Methods:** PharmCAT · DESeq2 · MOFA2 · DIABLO · XGBoost · SHAP · PyTorch · Docker  
**Code:** [bioinformatics-2026](https://github.com/codymgeoffroy/bioinformatics-2026)

---

::: {#phase-cards}
:::
